name: flexistock-backend
description: Root package to manage all FlexiStock backend services

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "GATEWAY,INVENTORY,ORDER,TRACK,FORECAST,NOTIFY,SEARCH" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgYellow,bgRed,bgWhite" "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix inventory-service" "npm run dev --prefix order-service" "npm run dev --prefix track-service" "npm run dev --prefix forecast_service" "npm run dev --prefix notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix search-service"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix inventory-service && npm install --prefix order-service && npm install --prefix track-service && npm install --prefix forecast_service && npm install --prefix notification-service && npm install --prefix search-service
